scores.justification: Agent successfully identified Sarah Chen as u042 via case-insensitive search on the users resource, retrieving her email (sarah.chen@acme.io) and confirming her identity.

Agent found ticket t019 (subject: 'billing broken since the weekend') and retrieved u042's full record showing status='suspended' with status_changed_at='2026-04-22T11:47:00Z' and notes about billing dispute.
Agent retrieved all three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) on Sarah's account, each showing flagged=true and flag_reason='billing anomaly; see ticket t019'.

Final summary coherently connects Sarah → escalated ticket t019 → auto-suspension on 2026-04-22 → three flagged multi-currency orders (o102, o107, o115) into a unified narrative explaining that the suspension (not payment failure) is blocking checkout, with root cause analysis and recommendations.
